symptoms: Brown concentric rings on older leaves
immediate_actions: Remove heavily infected leaves (do not compost).
Avoid overhead irrigation; water near the soil.

chemical_options.note: Follow label directions and local agriculture advisory.

Tomato___Early_blight.safety_note: Prototype advisory—confirm with local KVK/agri officer and follow product label.

immediate_actions: No disease signs detected. Continue monitoring.
Tomato___healthy.safety_note: If symptoms exist, retake photo or consult expert.

immediate_actions: Retake photo: single leaf, close-up, good lighting, plain background.
If symptoms persist, consult local agriculture officer.
Unknown.safety_note: No chemical advice given for unknown cases.
